allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\python-3.11.9-amd64.exe"\) { $f = Get-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\python-3.11.9-amd64.exe"; Write-Output "File: $\($f.Name\)"; Write-Output "Size: $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1MB, 2\)\) MB"; Write-Output "Path: $\($f.FullName\)" } else { Write-Output "File not found" })
